\tzpentry{ID4404}{Meta Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4404 introduces Meta Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Hhat_{\mathrm{meta}}^{\mathrm{eff}} = \int_{\mathrm{DAANSphere}} \mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{meta}}\bigl(\bm{\xi}; \{\Phi_p\}\bigr) \,\mathrm{d}\mu_{\mathrm{DAAN}}(\bm{\xi}), \end{equation}
